hero.title: About Richard Norwood
hero.subtitle: Certified PMP® | Revenue Enablement & Conversion Journey Architect

bio: My commercial perspective didn't start in a boardroom; it started in community outreach, bridging the gap between stakeholders and access to care for thousands of youth in Alabama. That foundation in relationship-building evolved into a focus on systematic performance when I became a Continuous Improvement Manager.

There, I learned to replace 'lazy management' with behavior-based coaching, setting a foundation that carried into my role as a Regional Sales Manager. I didn't just 'support' teams; I built the online presence and signal-capture frameworks that turned abstract activity into 52% conversion lift.

Throughout every managerial role, one principle remained primary: managing businesses as metrics. Most consultants optimize a single channel, but I bridge the 'Imagination Gap' by showing you the entire system those channels live inside.

Ever wondered why leads vanish? It's usually a structural friction point. As a certified Project Management Professional (PMP), I bring 15+ years of delivery discipline to uncover these revenue leaks, fix the system, and turn 22+ structural checkpoints into measurable, predictable outcomes.

certifications.name: Project Management Professional (PMP)
certifications.description: Ensures structured delivery and project accountability—turning abstract advice into measurable outcomes.

certifications.name: Google Data Analytics
certifications.description: Evidence-based decision making using statistical analysis to uncover hidden revenue leaks.

certifications.name: Google Project Management
certifications.description: Foundational discipline in Agile methodology and continuous improvement workflows.
